# Joseph Blas

> AI Developer · AV Systems Veteran · Multi-Agent Systems Engineer

## Contact & Availability

- **Location:** Escondido / San Diego, CA
- **Open to:** AI Development, DevOps/SRE, Embedded/Robotics roles (San Diego or remote)
- **Email:** blasj408@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://cv-joseph.vercel.app
- **Entity Home / About**: https://cv-joseph.vercel.app/about
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/joseph-blas
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/joblas
- **Company:** https://joestechsolutions.com

## Professional Summary

AI developer building production multi-agent systems. Run a 22-agent AI team (OpenClaw) that handles real business operations — email, CRM, invoicing, SEO, and deployments. Ship full-stack applications using React/React Native, TypeScript, Python, and PostgreSQL. Use AI coding assistants daily as core development tools.

Previously: 15+ years as an autonomous vehicle systems specialist. Built Google's Firefly autonomous vehicle from the ground up. Supported the world's first fully driverless ride on public roads (2015). Subject Matter Expert for drive-by-wire systems across the first 100 Google self-driving cars and 10 hardware iterations. Managed sensor calibration operations for the entire Google AV fleet — final release authority. Led fleet operations at Uber ATG and Pronto.ai. ITAR-controlled hardware experience. U.S. Citizen, DOD clearance eligible.

## Target Roles

1. **AI Developer** — Multi-agent systems, full-stack AI apps, RAG, prompt engineering
2. **DevOps / SRE Engineer** — AWS, GCP, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD
3. **Embedded / Robotics Engineer** — Sensor integration, drive-by-wire, CAN/LIN, HIL testing

## Key Achievement: OpenClaw (22-Agent System)

Multi-agent AI system running real business operations:

- **Architecture:** 22 specialized agents orchestrated via n8n
- **Capabilities:** Email routing, CRM automation, invoicing, SEO optimization, deployment pipelines
- **AI Models:** Claude and OpenAI APIs with custom prompt engineering
- **Stack:** n8n, CrewAI, LangChain, RAG systems

## Key Achievement: Google Self-Driving Car (Firefly)

- Built Google's Firefly autonomous vehicle from the ground up — fully custom, all-electric, no steering wheel or pedals
- Drive-by-wire SME across 100 vehicles and 10 hardware iterations
- Managed sensor calibration for entire fleet — final release authority
- Reduced calibration from 9 hours to 60 minutes (promoted to L4)
- Supported world's first fully driverless ride on public roads (2015)
- Traveled to Roush (Detroit) to train manufacturing teams

## Core Competencies

- **Multi-Agent AI Systems:** 22-agent orchestration (n8n, CrewAI, LangChain), RAG, prompt engineering
- **Full-Stack AI Development:** React, TypeScript, Python, Next.js, Supabase, AI APIs
- **AV Systems Integration:** Sensor calibration, drive-by-wire SME, ADAS validation, CAN/LIN
- **Client-Facing Delivery:** 10+ executive/investor demos, client consulting, private AI deployment
- **Cloud & DevOps:** AWS, GCP, Docker, K8s, Terraform, CI/CD
- **Hardware-Software Bridge:** HIL test rigs, bench testing, embedded validation, wiring harness fabrication

## Tech Stack

### AI / LLM
- Claude & OpenAI APIs — multi-agent orchestration, RAG, prompt engineering
- LangChain / CrewAI — agent frameworks
- Ollama / Open WebUI — private AI deployment
- n8n — workflow automation and agent orchestration

### Frontend
- React, React Native, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Expo

### Backend
- Node.js, Python / Flask, PostgreSQL, Supabase, REST APIs, Edge Functions

### DevOps
- Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS, GCP, CI/CD, Git, Vercel

### AV / Hardware
- Drive-by-wire systems (SME), sensor calibration (intrinsic & extrinsic)
- CAN/LIN networks, ADAS, HIL test rigs, bench testing
- Wiring harness fabrication, power systems, redundancy architecture
- Oscilloscopes, multimeters, signal analyzers, power supplies, DAQ systems

## Work Experience

### Joe's Tech Solutions LLC (2023-Present) — Founder & AI Developer
- Built and operate 22-agent AI system handling real business operations
- Develop private AI solutions for SMB clients (Ollama, Open WebUI, n8n)
- Ship production web and mobile apps: React, Next.js, React Native, TypeScript, Supabase
- Created Whisper Walkie — open source push-to-talk voice typing (100% local)
- Built The Skate Workshop — React Native app for Olympic coach (40+ tables, Stripe Connect)

### OvationCXM (2023-Present) — Field Service Technician
- Deploy and configure POS systems integrating hardware, software, and network components
- Troubleshoot complex technical issues across multiple system layers

### Pronto.ai (2018-2019) — Technician
- Sole technician hired by founder Anthony Levandowski
- Built, integrated, and operated entire autonomous vehicle fleet
- 2,900-mile cross-country autonomous demo with zero critical failures
- 10+ executive and investor demonstrations

### Uber ATG / Otto (2016-2018) — Autonomous Truck Technician
- Led system integration for 10-truck autonomous fleet (~90% uptime)
- Log analysis, root cause analysis, end-to-end testing

### Google Self-Driving Car Project / Waymo (2009-2016) — Program Manager L4
- Built Firefly autonomous vehicle from the ground up
- Drive-by-wire SME across first 100 vehicles and 10 hardware iterations
- Sensor calibration operations for entire fleet — final release authority
- Reduced calibration from 9 hours to 60 minutes (promoted to L4)
- Supported world's first fully driverless ride (2015)
- Traveled to Roush (Detroit) to train manufacturing teams
- ITAR-controlled hardware experience

## Projects

### OpenClaw — 22-Agent AI System
Multi-agent system running real business operations. 22 specialized agents orchestrated via n8n.

### The Skate Workshop — React Native Mobile App
Full-stack app for Olympic skateboarding coach. 40+ Supabase tables, 18+ Edge Functions, Stripe Connect.
Live at theskateworkshop.app

### Career Ops — AI Job Search Pipeline (Open Source)
Evaluates offers with scoring, generates ATS-optimized CVs, pre-fills applications. Built on Claude Code.

### DALL-E Image Generator — Live Web Application
Production AI image generation using OpenAI DALL-E 3.0 API. Live at jblas-dall-e.com

### Whisper Walkie — Open Source Voice Typing
Push-to-talk voice typing tool with 100% local processing.

### Cloud Infrastructure Projects
Multicloud Terraform deployment (AWS/GCP), K8s migration with Cloud SQL HA, legacy modernization with Anthos/GKE.

### cv-joseph — This Portfolio (Open Source)
Interactive CV with AI chatbot, voice mode, RAG pipeline, and multi-layer defense. github.com/joblas/cv-joseph

## Portfolio Case Studies

### The Self-Healing Chatbot
Production LLMOps system powering this portfolio's AI chat. Features 6-layer defense with canary token injection and fingerprint detection. 71 automated evals with CI gate enforcement and trace-to-eval closed loop. Cost: <$0.005 per conversation on $0 infrastructure. Batch eval pipeline uses Sonnet to score intent, quality, safety, and jailbreak resistance. Alerts via Resend.

### n8n for Product Managers
Guide to workflow automation with n8n for non-technical product managers.

### AI Agent Jacobo
AI voice agent case study — automated phone bookings and inquiries.

### Programmatic SEO
4,700+ landing pages generated from Airtable ERP data.
